rivers.name: Koshi River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected main stem aligned with the named Koshi trunk.

rivers.name: Tamor River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: continuous eastern trunk with defensible shape and length.

rivers.name: Sun Koshi River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: extended Sun Koshi routing preserves the local trunk name and carries the line through to the lower Koshi system instead of ending abruptly upstream.

rivers.name: Dudh Koshi River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Dudh Koshi corridor is visually coherent and now ties cleanly into the extended Sun Koshi trunk.

rivers.name: Tama Koshi River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Tama Koshi corridor is publishable and no longer terminates against a missing parent trunk.

rivers.name: Indrawati River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: routed line is connected and follows the visible Indrawati corridor.

rivers.name: Balephi Khola
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected tributary geometry is publishable.

rivers.name: Narayani River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Narayani trunk is defensible and map-ready.

rivers.name: Kali Gandaki River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: widened routing window recovers a defensible connected Kali Gandaki trunk and removes a major Gandaki gap.

rivers.name: Marsyangdi River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Marsyangdi trunk aligns cleanly enough to publish and ties back into the central Gandaki network.

rivers.name: Budhi Gandaki River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Budhi Gandaki path is publishable.

rivers.name: Trishuli River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Trishuli path resolves the fragmented OSM presentation problem.

rivers.name: Seti Gandaki River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: routed Seti Gandaki candidate still reads as an isolated stub, so it stays hidden until a defensible confluence can be recovered.

rivers.name: Madi River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: extended Madi routing recovers the downstream tie-in so the published line no longer reads as an island.

rivers.name: East Rapti River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: East Rapti route is connected and visually coherent.

rivers.name: Karnali River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Karnali trunk is publishable.

rivers.name: Mugu Karnali River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected upper tributary geometry is publishable.

rivers.name: Mahakali River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: narrowed aliases plus a wider routing window recover the Mahakali border trunk and restore a publishable western system line.

rivers.name: Babai River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: extended Babai routing carries the visible main stem through to the lower border-side corridor instead of stopping abruptly mid-basin.

rivers.name: Bagmati River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Bagmati route is publishable.

rivers.name: Kamala River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: extended Kamala routing preserves a fuller downstream read across the plains-facing basin edge.

rivers.name: Tinau River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: extended Tinau routing removes the abrupt downstream cutoff and makes the basin read as a complete trunk.

rivers.name: Mechi River
rivers.review_note: Manual review: connected Mechi border river is publishable.
